name: Reptilian Club Boyz
description: '''Reptilian Club Boyz''', also known as '''RCB''' or '''Blood Rayne Boys''', was an American [[Internet rap]] collective based in [[Tennessee]]. Formed by rappers Hi-C and Diamondsonmydick in 2016, they have been credited as influential in the [[2020s underground rap]] scene and development of the [[hexD]] genre.
